# bitbucketdc_project_hook (Resource)

Manages a Bitbucket Data Center project-level hook. Project hooks apply to all repositories within the project. Works with any plugin that uses the Bitbucket hook framework (e.g. Webhook to Jenkins for Bitbucket). The settings_json attribute accepts arbitrary JSON matching the plugin's settings schema.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `hook_key` (String) The fully-qualified hook key (e.g. com.nerdwin15.stash-stash-webhook-jenkins:postReceiveHook).
- `project_key` (String) The project key.

### Optional

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the hook is enabled. Defaults to true.
- `settings_json` (String) Plugin-specific settings as a JSON string. Use jsonencode() to construct it. The exact fields depend on the plugin. Defaults to '{}'.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier: {project_key}/{hook_key}.
